name: Back 2 the Tee
address: 201 S Washington St STE 10, Owosso, MI 48867
about: Back 2 the Tee is an indoor golf venue and family-owned business in Owosso, MI. The facility utilizes Full Swing simulators to provide year-round golfing, leagues, coaching, and equipment fitting. The venue caters to a diverse range of patrons, from serious golfers seeking to improve their game to families and groups looking for entertainment. Beyond golf, the simulators support a variety of other sports and activities like baseball, soccer, and a unique zombie dodgeball mode. The atmosphere is described as welcoming and community-focused, with an emphasis on making golf fun, competitive, and accessible.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of sports and games available on premium Full Swing simulators
Flexible leagues with multiple formats and competitive options
Professional coaching from a former PGA Tour Pro and high school coach
Family-friendly environment with options for kids and group events

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is permitted; venue does not have an on-site kitchen.
Liquor license allows for the sale of canned seltzers and beer.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator hardware; endorsed by PGA Tour, Golf Channel, and Tiger Woods.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether clubs are available for rent. It is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food is permitted. The venue has a liquor license and sells canned seltzers and beer, but does not have an on-site kitchen.

faq.question: How many holes can one person play in an hour?
faq.answer: One person can play 18 holes per hour. For two people, it is 9 holes per hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. They offer junior golf coaching, and testimonials mention having a great time with kids, including activities like zombie dodgeball.
